name: HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 timesheets/month tool
description: For HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 timesheets/month, manual reconciliation causes delays in payroll processing. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 timesheets/month
problem_solved: Manual reconciliation of timesheets against payroll inputs is time-consuming and error-prone.
features: Monthly summary reports for payroll reconciliation

locked_fields.primary_user: HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 timesheets/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual reconciliation of timesheets against payroll inputs is time-consuming and error-prone.
